calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-07-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Thursday, January 07, 2016 in Department 525:
John Tellez, Appellant/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona.
Andres M. Sanchez, Esq. (415-512-9865), Limited Scope counsel for Respondent/Defendant Vishnu Shah who is also present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
Respondent Vishnu Shah testifies on his own behalf under direct examination by Mr. Sanchez and responds to the questions from the Court. Counsel went through the Small Claims exhibits in the Court.
The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (A) - complaint tracking, settlement agreement, and letter for room maintenance

Appellant John Tellez testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (1) - May 11, 2012 notice of violation of building inspection.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly marked evidence is retained.

Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-05-2015 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-05-2015 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-31-2015 Continued To Nov-05-15 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-31-2015 Continued To Nov-05-15 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506
